title: goniophlebium microlepis
intro: Goniophlebium microlepis is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goniophlebium microlepis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
